product_name: Convert Beam Plate To Contour Plate
purpose: Converts Beam Plate To Contour Plate and associate all the objects(Bolt, weld and cuts) to newly converted contour plate.

Content: This application converts selected Beam Plates to Contour plates. If it is a component, it will explode and associate the bolts, welds and cuts to a newly converted contour plate. Additional option to chamfer the corners while conversion and modify them later.

download_process: Once You purchase the tool, a link will be sent to your mail to download.
installation_process: Double click on the installation Package
System will show installed Tekla Versions on your system
Choose the version(s) to be installed.
Close the Application. (Do not Delete the File)
It will be queued for the installation when Tekla is open next time.
Application will be installed before opening the software.
Search for Beam Plate To Contour Plate under Application and Components.
Let the Application automate the manual process
